method: Compared 02_reader_report.md and 08_final_report.md against 09_final_canonical.json and 11_canonical_enriched.json to identify facts stated in narrative but not yet structured in canonical. Only directly supported facts promoted.

promoted_facts.rationale: Present in reader report as structural element; not previously flagged in canonical.

promoted_facts.value: Sales are somewhat seasonal — franchisor runs camp sessions during the summer rather than regular programs
promoted_facts.rationale: Directly surfaced seasonality fact in Item 1 body; relevant to unit economics and cash flow modeling.

promoted_facts.value: Competes with other Ivybrook Academy franchisees, affiliate-owned Ivybrook Academy schools, private preschools, Montessori schools, church-based preschools, private kindergartens, and childcare centers (national, regional, and local)
promoted_facts.rationale: Competitive set directly surfaced in Item 1.

promoted_facts.value: Children ages 1 to 6 from families that place a high priority on quality early childhood education
promoted_facts.rationale: Target market definition directly surfaced.

promoted_facts.value: Approximately 2 months before the opening of the School
promoted_facts.rationale: Training timing directly surfaced but not captured in canonical.

promoted_facts.value: Prior to opening, an owner and another person (either a staff representative or the School Administrator) must complete two weeks of in-person training at a School that is approved to be a training facility
promoted_facts.rationale: Two-week in-person training at training-approved School directly surfaced but not explicit in canonical training section.

promoted_facts.value: Franchisor may require license agreement directly with suppliers as alternative to sublicense from franchisor/affiliate
promoted_facts.rationale: Alternative license structure directly surfaced.

promoted_facts.value: Franchisor is not obligated to provide ongoing maintenance, repairs, upgrades, or updates to franchisee computer system. Estimated $2,000–$3,000/year for optional/required maintenance contracts.
promoted_facts.rationale: Already partially captured but the no-obligation clause was not explicit in canonical.

promoted_facts.value: Franchisor designates a 'Designated Area' for site selection prior to Territory designation; the Designated Area does not grant territorial exclusivity or protection and terminates when the Territory is designated
promoted_facts.rationale: Two-phase territory mechanism surfaced in narrative but not structured in canonical.

promoted_facts.value: Franchisee must have franchisor's acceptance of a site within 6 months following the date of the franchise agreement; franchisor may terminate if not
promoted_facts.rationale: 6-month site acceptance deadline surfaced in narrative but not structured in canonical.

promoted_facts.value: General location and neighborhood, competition, trade area demographics, visibility, and physical characteristics of existing buildings
promoted_facts.rationale: Site selection criteria directly surfaced.

promoted_facts.value: If franchisee needs franchisor's assistance to relocate and franchisor agrees, franchisee must reimburse franchisor's costs to assist (Relocation Assistance, Item 6 table)
promoted_facts.rationale: Relocation fee-for-cost structure captured in tables but not in territory canonical.

promoted_facts.value: Franchisor does not offer direct or indirect financing and does not guarantee any agreement or lease
promoted_facts.rationale: Item 10 negative disclosure directly surfaced.

promoted_facts.value: Drew McWilliams (CEO) is a licensed real estate agent and may receive a referral fee or commission from a real estate broker that assists franchisees in finding a location
promoted_facts.rationale: Already in canonical under supplier_control_economics.insider_conflict but also worth flagging as a distinct structural fact.

promoted_facts.derivation: Opened in 2022 (9) + 2023 (8) + 2024 (8) = 25 gross openings over three years; net franchised growth 17->40 = +23 (difference explained by 2 Texas 'other ceased' events)
promoted_facts.rationale: Gross-opened count derivable directly from Item 20 Table 3 totals.

promoted_facts.value: $89,277 constructive royalty on affiliate school (7% of $1,487,947 gross revenue — matches within rounding)
promoted_facts.rationale: Table 2A royalty line is constructive since affiliate does not actually pay; directly disclosed in narrative.

promoted_facts.value: $14,879 constructive brand fund contribution on affiliate school (1% of $1,487,947 — matches exactly)
promoted_facts.rationale: Cross-check confirms table construction method; directly disclosed.

value: Not open at least two full years as of 12/31/2024
Not in compliance with brand standards
promoted_facts.rationale: Exclusion criteria directly surfaced.

promoted_facts.value: Most states and localities have specific regulations that may affect businesses offering educational and childcare services, including licensing, personnel screening (background checks, criminal records), personnel credentials, age restrictions, food service, labor and employment, limitations on restrictive covenants, and ADA compliance
promoted_facts.rationale: Regulatory risk factor directly surfaced in Item 1.

promoted_facts.value: Affiliate-owned schools are not required to contribute to the Brand Fund on the same basis as franchisees; other franchisees may contribute at a different rate than you
promoted_facts.rationale: Uneven contribution basis directly surfaced; material diligence signal.

promoted_facts.value: Brand Fund is not audited, although franchisor can require that it be audited
promoted_facts.rationale: Audit status directly surfaced; already reflected in Brand Fund notes but not as canonical field.

promoted_facts.value: Franchisor reserves the right to substitute different trademarks
promoted_facts.rationale: Material IP-substitution right directly surfaced.

promoted_facts.value: Any innovations conceived, invented, created, designed, or developed by franchisee or its owners/officers/School Administrator/CEO/managers/employees relating to the School are deemed assigned to franchisor, including all intellectual property rights
promoted_facts.rationale: Broad IP-assignment clause directly surfaced.

promoted_facts.value: In-term and post-term noncompete covers all owners plus their spouses or domestic partners plus certain designated others
promoted_facts.rationale: Spouse scope already in Item 17 table but worth structuring separately.
Promoted from R2 retry result; already added to 09_final_canonical after Step 9 merge.

facts_in_narrative_but_NOT_promoted_beca: Specific auditor firm name (Exhibit J image-only)
Whether the Crux acquisition is reflected in Exhibit J subsequent events (unknowable without reading Exhibit J)
contradictions_noted_during_audit: The identity.concept_description canonical field says '180–250 students' enrollment range — this is actually an Item 19 sample description, not an Item 1 concept description. The 180–250 range appears in Item 19 (p45), not Item 1. Preserved for clarity.

Franchisor sample characterization: Item 19 description says affiliate 'substantially similar to the Ivybrook Academy schools for which we are offering franchises' — should be preserved as an FPR-reasonableness assertion.
